_comment: A REAL structured screen-walk snapshot captured from the BUILT task_tracker app via a read-only applyModelApiCode walk (Mentor MCP, 2026-07-02, app specrunner_tasktracker_nl_looptest rev 3). Shape per the contract in harness/verify.py: {id|name, components:[{id,type,boundTo,sourceEntity}], navigation:[{fromComponent,event,toScreen}]}. A data widget's boundTo is the AGGREGATE (GetTaskLists.List); sourceEntity is the entity that aggregate queries (TaskList), resolved IN the walk so an entity-level spec binding matches without a name heuristic. Screen keys are the emitted NAMES (Lists/Tasks); the verifier normalizes name->id. Matches examples/task_tracker/app_spec.json, so `harness-verify --phase live --screens` PASSES 9/9.
